query:
WITH month_daily AS (
  SELECT
    edp.userId,
    SUM(CAST(edp.totalPoints AS DECIMAL(12,6))) AS month_daily_points,
    SUM(CAST(edp.finalKpiScore AS DECIMAL(12,6))) AS month_final_kpi_score,
    SUM(CASE WHEN edp.attendanceFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendance_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN edp.businessDate = CURDATE() THEN CAST(edp.totalPoints AS DECIMAL(12,6)) ELSE 0 END) AS today_daily_points
  FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
  WHERE edp.businessDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND CURDATE()
  GROUP BY edp.userId
),
month_support AS (
  SELECT
    stc.userId,
    SUM(CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS support_hours,
    SUM(CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 8) AS support_points,
    SUM(CASE WHEN stc.businessDate = CURDATE() THEN CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 8 ELSE 0 END) AS today_support_points,
    COUNT(DISTINCT stc.businessDate) AS support_days
  FROM support_task_compensations stc
  WHERE stc.businessDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND CURDATE()
  GROUP BY stc.userId
)
SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.name,
  u.role,
  COALESCE(md.month_daily_points, 0) + COALESCE(ms.support_points, 0) AS month_total_points,
  COALESCE(md.month_final_kpi_score, 0) AS summed_final_kpi_score,
  COALESCE(md.attendance_days, 0) AS attendance_days_from_daily,
  COALESCE(ms.support_days, 0) AS support_days,
  COALESCE(ms.support_hours, 0) AS support_hours,
  (COALESCE(md.today_daily_points, 0) + COALESCE(ms.today_support_points, 0)) * 100 AS today_display_points
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN month_daily md ON md.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN month_support ms ON ms.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role <> 'admin'
ORDER BY u.id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute WITH month_daily AS (
  SELECT
    edp.userId,
    SUM(CAST(edp.totalPoints AS DECIMAL(12,6))) AS month_daily_points,
    SUM(CAST(edp.finalKpiScore AS DECIMAL(12,6))) AS month_final_kpi_score,
    SUM(CASE WHEN edp.attendanceFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendance_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN edp.businessDate = CURDATE() THEN CAST(edp.totalPoints AS DECIMAL(12,6)) ELSE 0 END) AS today_daily_points
  FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
  WHERE edp.businessDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND CURDATE()
  GROUP BY edp.userId
),
month_support AS (
  SELECT
    stc.userId,
    SUM(CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS support_hours,
    SUM(CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 8) AS support_points,
    SUM(CASE WHEN stc.businessDate = CURDATE() THEN CAST(stc.supportHours AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 8 ELSE 0 END) AS today_support_points,
    COUNT(DISTINCT stc.businessDate) AS support_days
  FROM support_task_compensations stc
  WHERE stc.businessDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND CURDATE()
  GROUP BY stc.userId
)
SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.name,
  u.role,
  COALESCE(md.month_daily_points, 0) + COALESCE(ms.support_points, 0) AS month_total_points,
  COALESCE(md.month_final_kpi_score, 0) AS summed_final_kpi_score,
  COALESCE(md.attendance_days, 0) AS attendance_days_from_daily,
  COALESCE(ms.support_days, 0) AS support_days,
  COALESCE(ms.support_hours, 0) AS support_hours,
  (COALESCE(md.today_daily_points, 0) + COALESCE(ms.today_support_points, 0)) * 100 AS today_display_points
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN month_daily md ON md.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN month_support ms ON ms.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role <> 'admin'
ORDER BY u.id;
